UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IMBELLONI CONSTRUCTION CO.INC. A CALIF. CORP. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOUSHANGI, ARI ANDREWS, TIFFANY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 55 POLK ST #302, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGEMENT INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES PER C.C.P. 415.46.
